🔬 Science

The Water Cycle Song

A catchy song that teaches the water cycle steps.

📚 Chapter 4 ⏱️ 6 min
🎯

I watched this video!

Tap the button when you are done to earn a sticker!

Sing Along With the Water Cycle

Learn evaporation, condensation and precipitation with a fun song you can sing!

What You Will Learn

  • The four steps of the water cycle
  • How clouds form
  • Where rain comes from

Tip: Try to sing along the second time you watch!

After the song, see if you can explain the water cycle to a friend or family member.

#science #water #nature
